report.summary: Community v8 cycle: Drafted 3 tweets (#208-210) covering Bitcoin mid-cycle dip zone (Benjamin Cowen), Ethereum Hegota fork deprioritization, and HASH -25% crash with risk management angle. Created Discord/TG late-night recap and Newsletter v33 addendum on the mid-cycle dip. Designed SVG social card: Mid-Cycle Dip Zone (1200x630 with halving progress bar, 4 stat cards, historical dip comparisons). 554 pages published. 210 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #208: Bitcoin Mid-Cycle Dip Zone — Day 703 post-halving, Benjamin Cowen analysis, 2016 dipped 38% then 20x, 2020 dipped 53% then ATH. Links to halving guide + backtesting engine. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 9AM ET.

Tweet #209: Ethereum Hegota Fork Shakeup — Vitalik's quantum-resistant proposals deprioritized, ETH down 50%+ from ATH, narrative clarity matters. Links to ZK proofs guide + Ethereum ecosystem. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 2PM ET.

Tweet #210: HASH Crashes 25% Risk Management — portfolio risk checklist during extreme fear, DCA > timing the bottom. Links to risk-analyzer, portfolio-tracker, liquidation-heatmap. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 6PM ET.
Discord/TG: Late-Night Recap — BTC $66,257, ETH $1,981, F&G 10. Cowen mid-cycle dip, Hegota fork, HASH -25%, CFTC blockchain for AI. Tool links.
Newsletter v33 Addendum — 'The Mid-Cycle Dip Is Here': Cowen confirms correction zone, Hegota fork narrative, HASH crash reminder, CFTC bright spot.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Bitcoin Mid-Cycle Dip Zone (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with MID-CYCLE DIP ZONE alert badge. Headline: 'Bitcoin Enters The Mid-Cycle Correction'. Halving cycle progress bar (day 703/777, 90.5% fill with indigo-cyan gradient). 4 stat cards: BTC $66,257 (-47% ATH, -24% YTD), F&G 10 (46-day streak, FTX-level), Historical Dips (2016 -38%→20x, 2020 -53%→ATH, 2026 -47%→???), Liquidations $450M (89% longs, $258M in 4h). Context panel: Iran Day 28, Rising Oil, $14B Options, Hegota Fork, HASH -25%, $2.43T market cap. CTA: 'Backtest your strategy → degen0x.com'. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-mid-cycle-dip.svg
